title: Small Hand Tools
description: Makes tools appear smaller in first person view to reduce screen blockage and make aiming feel clearer during PvP.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7462e40d4d006d6770eae020d57f315b679d0b7.png)
## 🌊 Overview

Small Hand Tools reduces the size of tools in first person view to create a cleaner screen and improve visibility during PvP combat.

---

## ⚔ Features

• Smaller first person tool view
• Cleaner screen visibility
• Better aiming feel during PvP
• Lightweight resource pack

---

## 🎮 Perfect For

• PvP gameplay
• Crystal PvP
• Bedwars
• Survival combat

---
